'''Mingo Bovark''' was a [[Nimbanel/Legends|Nimbanel]] [[Empire-in-exile|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] loyal to [[Roan Fel]].<ref name="CSWE" /> In [[137 ABY]], he met with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gar Stazi]] at [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] for negotiations of an alliance with the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]].<ref name="Legacy 9" /> However, a plot by [[Morrigan Corde]] and [[Jor Torlin]] led to the two factions [[Skirmish on The Wheel|firing upon each other]], and the proposed alliance was dead before it even began. Bovark was attacked by Stazi with a knife, but was saved by [[Imperial Knight]]s [[Antares Draco]] and [[Ganner Krieg]].<ref name="Legacy 10" />

==Behind the scenes==
On the set of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']], Mingo was one of the nicknames of the Nimbanel later identified as [[Mosep Binneed/Legends|Mosep Binneed]].<ref name="SWArchive-Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases - Flies, Snails and Hammerheads">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref>
